# Drip Campaign Skill

Drip Campaign Skill is a skill package for time-based nurture streams, branching logic, and conversion analysis.

Install:

```bash
npx skills add dripcampaignskill
```

## Primary agent resources

- Markdown index: https://dripcampaignskill.com/index.md
- Skill page: https://dripcampaignskill.com/skill/index.md
- Raw SKILL.md: https://dripcampaignskill.com/skills/dripcampaignskill/SKILL.md
- Skill discovery JSON: https://dripcampaignskill.com/.well-known/skills/index.json

## Articles

- How to Build an Agent-Ready Drip Campaign Strategy: https://dripcampaignskill.com/articles/agent-ready-email-strategy/index.md
- The Practical Drip Campaign Operations Playbook for AI Agents: https://dripcampaignskill.com/articles/email-operations-playbook/index.md
- Drip Campaign Skill Audit Checklist: From Prompt to Production: https://dripcampaignskill.com/articles/email-skill-audit-checklist/index.md
